title: Understanding React Fiber Architecture
author: Dan Abramov

title: The Complete useEffect Guide
author: Kent C. Dodds
excerpt: Everything you need to know about useEffect dependency arrays, cleanup functions, and avoiding infinite loops.

title: Server Components Explained

excerpt: How React Server Components enable zero-bundle-size components and seamless server-client integration.

title: React 19: The New Compiler

excerpt: Automatic memoization without useMemo or useCallback. Learn how the React Compiler optimizes your code.

title: Building Accessible React Apps
author: Marco Zehe
excerpt: Practical ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation, and screen reader testing for inclusive React applications.

title: State Machines in React
author: David Khourshid
excerpt: Model complex UI logic with finite state machines. From useReducer to XState for predictable state management.

title: CSS-in-JS: The Modern Approach

title: React Native: One Codebase, Two Platforms
